---
title: "Download ERA5 Data"
engine: jupyter       # <-- important
jupyter: myproj      # or the exact kernel name you want
---

#### ***Climatological Reference Period***

Average climate computed for a consecutive 30 year period defined by the World Meteorological Organization (WMO)
  <https://community.wmo.int/en/activity-areas/climate-services/climate-products-and-initiatives/wmo-climatological-normals>

```{python climatological-reference-period}
crp_beg = 1961
crp_end = 1990
crp_lbl = "CRP-" + str(crp_beg) + "-" + str(crp_end)
```

#### ***Recent Climate Period***

Average climate computed for a period of at least ten years starting on 1 January of a year ending with the digit 1 (WMO definition)

```{python recent-climate-period}
rcp_beg = 2011
rcp_end = 2020
rcp_lbl = "RCP-" + str(rcp_beg) + "-" + str(rcp_end)
```

#### Packages

```{python}

import cdsapi
import os
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime

```

#### Paths

```{python paths}
dir_download = "_data/01-era5-download/"
```

#### Download ERA5 climate data

```{python download-ERA5-climate-data}
def fn_download_climate_data(
    pth: str, 
    var: str,
    beg: int,
    end: int):

    out = Path(pth)
    yrs = list(range(beg, end+1))
    mths = list(range(1, 13))

    if var == "t":
        variable_name = "2m_temperature"
    elif var == "p":
        variable_name = "total_precipitation"

    c = cdsapi.Client()  # will read ~/.cdsapirc

    c.retrieve(
        "reanalysis-era5-single-levels-monthly-means",
        {
            "product_type": "monthly_averaged_reanalysis",
            "variable": variable_name,
            "year": yrs,
            "month": mths,
            "time": "00:00",
            "format": "netcdf"
        },
        str(out),
    )

pth_t = dir_download + "crp-t-monthly.nc" 
pth_p = dir_download + "crp-p-monthly.nc" 
if not os.path.exists(pth_t) or not os.path.exists(pth_p):
    fn_download_climate_data(pth_t, "t", crp_beg, crp_end)
    fn_download_climate_data(pth_p, "p", crp_beg, crp_end)

pth_t = dir_download + "rcp-t-monthly.nc" 
pth_p = dir_download + "rcp-p-monthly.nc"
if not os.path.exists(pth_t) or not os.path.exists(pth_p):
    fn_download_climate_data(pth_t, "t", rcp_beg, rcp_end)
    fn_download_climate_data(pth_p, "p", rcp_beg, rcp_end)
```

#### Download ERA5 Land Sea Mask

```{python download-era5-land-sea-mask}
def fn_download_land_sea_mask(pth: str):
    out = Path(pth)
    c = cdsapi.Client() 
    c.retrieve(
        "reanalysis-era5-single-levels",
        {
            "product_type": "reanalysis",
            "variable": "land_sea_mask",
            "year": "2000",
            "month": "01",
            "day": "01",
            "time": "00:00",
            "area": "90/-179.75/-90/180", # N/W/S/E (global)
            "grid": "0.25/0.25", # ERA5 native grid spacing
            "format": "netcdf"
        },
        str(out),
    )

pth_lsm = dir_download + "land-sea-mask.nc"
if not os.path.exists(pth_lsm) :
    fn_download_land_sea_mask(pth_lsm)
```
